summary: Team Chat feature fully tested - All 18 backend tests passed (100%), Frontend UI tests passed with all features working correctly. Chat page loads, channels work, messages send/display/edit/delete, emoji reactions toggle, @mentions work, replies work, and real-time polling functions.
passed_tests: Backend: Get channels requires authentication (401)
Backend: Get channels returns General channel auto-created
Backend: Create new channel
Backend: Send message to channel
Backend: Get channel messages with pagination
Backend: Edit own message
Backend: Delete own message (verified no longer in list)
Backend: Add emoji reaction to message
Backend: Toggle reaction off
Backend: Send message with reply_to reference
Backend: Send message with @mention (extracted from content)
Backend: Poll for new messages since timestamp
Backend: Get notifications with unread count
Backend: Mark notification as read
Backend: Mark all notifications as read
Backend: Edit nonexistent message returns 404
Backend: Delete nonexistent message returns 404
Backend: React to nonexistent message returns 404
Frontend: Chat page loads with Team Chat sidebar item
Frontend: General channel auto-created and selectable
Frontend: Create new channel via dialog
Frontend: Send messages to channel
Frontend: Messages display with sender info, timestamp, content
Frontend: Emoji reactions visible on messages (👍 1)
Frontend: Reply indicator visible (Replying to a message)
Frontend: @mention formatting (@Test User highlighted in purple)
Frontend: Message hover actions (emoji, reply, edit, delete)
Frontend: Emoji picker popover with 8 emojis
Frontend: Team Members section expandable
Frontend: @mention popover with team member list
Frontend: Edit/Delete buttons visible for own messages only
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed messages and channels during testing in General channel
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team Chat feature fully implemented and working. Uses polling (3 second interval) for real-time updates - not WebSocket. All CRUD operations work: channels (create, list), messages (send, edit, delete, reply), reactions (add/toggle off), mentions with notification creation. MongoDB collections used: chat_channels, chat_messages, notifications. Test user has access to General channel and TEST_ prefixed channels.
